    Projects

    Modeling the Chicago Pension Crisis — Varsity Math Modeling Team

    Published: June 18, 2026

    Captain & Lead Researcher: national champion math modeling team that modeled the Chicago pension crisis.

    Web Platforms & Competitive Programming — Computer Science Club

    Published: June 18, 2026

    Lead Developer & Competitor: built web platforms and represented the school at coding invitationals.

    Process Mining & Data Automation — Peech

    Published: June 18, 2026

    Process Mining & Data Automation Intern: PyCelonis scripts, operations dashboards, and Python web-scrapers.

    Autonomous Trash-Skimming Boat — County Civic Engineering Initiative

    Published: June 18, 2026

    Electrical Engineering Project Intern: designed an autonomous boat that skims trash from waterways.

    Agentic AI for Mechanical Engineering — Northwestern University

    Published: June 18, 2026

    Mechanical Engineering Research Intern exploring agentic AI and its applications in mechanical engineering.
